description: Small overview minimap for the workflow designer showing all states as colored rectangles, transitions as lines, and a viewport rectangle indicating the current visible area. Clicking navigates the main canvas.

examples.title: Minimap synced with designer canvas
examples.code: <TmWorkflowMinimap Definition="@_workflow" ViewBoxX="@_viewX" ViewBoxY="@_viewY" ViewBoxW="800" ViewBoxH="500" OnNavigate="@HandleMinimapNavigate" />
